findings.problem: Directive 3 bundles two actions ('run the suite and update the changelog') into a single numbered step, which is acceptable but slightly less individually checkable.
findings.fix: Optionally split into two ordered directives so each is verified independently.
findings.evidence: grep -n 'run the suite and update' prompts/generated/draft.md -> 41:3. run the suite and update the changelog

hallucination_risk.evidence: grep -n 'juniper-observability' pyproject.toml -> juniper-observability>=0.2.0 in the [tools] extra
